<!-- 
Thank you for contributing to the HTTP to MQTT gateway! 
Please fill out the sections below to help us review your changes efficiently.
-->

## Description
<!-- Provide a clear, concise summary of your changes and the motivation behind them. -->

## Related Issue(s)
<!-- 
Please link the issue(s) this PR addresses. 
Example: Fixes #12 or Closes #45 
-->
Fixes #

## Type of Change
<!-- Please delete options that are not relevant. -->
- [ ] `feat`: A new feature or functionality
- [ ] `fix`: A bug fix
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation updates only
- [ ] `style`: Formatting or cosmetic changes (no logic changes)
- [ ] `refactor`: Code changes that neither fix a bug nor add a feature
- [ ] `test`: Adding missing tests or correcting existing tests
- [ ] `chore`: Update to dependencies, build tools, or internal configs

## Project Scope
<!-- Which side of the gateway does this primarily affect? -->
- [ ] Incoming HTTP Endpoints
- [ ] Outgoing MQTT Client/Broker Logic
- [ ] Internal Logic / Docker / Deployment
- [ ] Other

## Checklist
<!-- Go over all the following points, and put an `x` in all the boxes that apply. -->
- [ ] My code follows the code style and guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have verified that my local changes pass all existing tests (if applicable).
- [ ] I have written tests to cover my new changes (if applicable).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / README accordingly.
- [ ] My commit messages follow the **Conventional Commits** specification (`type(scope): description`).
